# Planner routes

## Why this folder exists

URL surface for the unified planner: marketing landing, guest workspace, authenticated canvas.

## What is here

- (marketing)/ — landing, features, help
- (workspace)/canvas/, guest/ — editor entry points

## Rules

- Editor implementation is in features/planner/, not here
